user_comment: Absolutely loved it!! I ordered a large. It was perfect for my birthday photo shoot. I am 5’8 and 230lbs.

It's a yes for me! I ordered a M, I'm 5''4" and teeter between 135 and 140 lbs. I have a hard time with dresses since my torso is short. But this hit me in the right places, I love the fit. I sewed the slit since it was a bit high for my liking. Got a ton of compliments. Overall very pleased.

Beautiful Dress I ordered a medium and a large and the medium fit best. I’m 5,6” and 150lbs. The only downside was there was no slit for my leg and it wrapped kind of tight around the bottom so I was kind of restricted to a short stride when walking. I had to lift the dress up when walking faster so I could walk normally. I got so many compliments! Beware that if you like a tighter fit with this dress your underwear lines might be visible (I found a pair that got rid of this issue). This was a good last second dress that could’ve gone for formal or cocktail attire. It’ll do the job if you’re scrambling for a dress with little time.

The first one I ordered was a bit too big, but love the dress I ordered a medium as recommended, it ran a little big. It was very loose in the chest (I'm a 34c) and a bit big around the waist. I exchanged it for a small and it was perfect! The dress is flattering for us curvy ladies.

Nice soft dress I ordered a medium, and I feel like it fits like a medium. It fits a 36DD chest well and isn’t too tight, so it might be baggy on someone with a smaller chest. The length (unwashed) is right above the feet on a 5’5” tall person. The sewing stitches are a good length, not too long. (Some items I’ve ordered lately seem to be barely held together with a basting or long length stitch, but this dress is not like that.) The fabric is soft and comfortable. Very nice dress!

Get the dress🥰 I ordered a medium. Honestly I should have just gotten a small. It seemed to have stretched the longer I wore it so it wasn’t fitted as much. The top of the dress was to big, so I had to adjust it all night so my itty bitty boobs wouldn’t pop out but maybe the small would have made the top fit better. This color is indeed see through. I felt sexy and classy, plus the compliments help too. I’m 5.1, 130, 36C and I wear a xsmall to small depending on everything 😊 I’m giving it 5 stars bc If I had ordered the small this dress would have been magical. But this medium worked.
Super cute I ordered a medium. I’m 5’4 about 160 and it fit nicely. I wore a corset under the dress which made my butt pop and enhanced my curves. Material is not see through. Would buy again.

Fits great. I ordered a Medium. I’m about 5’9 and between 135-145 pounds. I am a 34D chest and the dress fit great. I wore it to my sisters wedding. It came a *tad* above the knee but I think that’s because I’m pretty tall. It wasn’t anything dramatic and it’s pretty true to the pictures. You can choose to wear the ribbon or to not, there’s no loops for it so it’s up to you.

Pleasantly Surprised! I ordered a selection of 8 wedding dresses on Amazon in anticipation of our destination wedding. This dress was hands down “the one”. The quality was much better than the others considering both craftsmanship and fabric. I’m a pretty solid size 8 or medium and it fit perfectly. The lace-up bodice design allows for a great fit. I am 5’3” and wore 4” heels, and the dress was still about 2” longer than ideal, but I’m accustomed to longer clothing items being too long because of my height. There is a trim around the bottom that would need to be removed, the length hemmed, then the trim replaced. I didn’t have time for that so I just picked it up a bit when walking. I did replace the belt with one that had rhinestones and pearls and had a bit more sparkle. The belt that comes with this dress is pretty but it has seed beads. The dress has cups sewn into the top so you could wear it without a bra if desired. It also has a strap on the inside that hooks in the back like the back of a bra that keeps it secure while you lace it up. The dress is a true white and is lined. I’m extremely happy with this purchase.

Love the dress! I ordered a single dress to see how it’d turn out for my bridesmaids. The yellow is perfect! I ordered a size medium (because it would at least fit one of them lol). But once I adjusted it, it turned out ok. Dress also came with a matching tank which works great if you’re not going to wear a backless style (it was way too big for me though I’m a 34A). Material feels really good and is not see-through. Shipping time was a bit long but arrived a little earlier than expected date. Sorry for long review, but I’m happy! Just ordered the other 5 dresses. Hope the quality is the same or better!

Amazing quality and beautiful dress! I ordered about (6) dresses and this was the winner! It fit great and has the embellishments on top, with the A-Line bottom. The bottom part does have a mesh-y overlay (its the same fabric as the top just without the embellishments. It's not my *favorite* thing but it didn't stop me from picking this dress. Also, super easy return process. I ordered several dresses from this seller in order to see which one fit best. I was impressed with the quality of all the dresses and will definitely be ordering from this seller again when I need fancy dresses! I ordered a size 16 here. Perfect fit , color, style for wedding I ordered about 15 different dresses in dusty blue for my sister’s wedding. This one was the only perfect one I found on Amazon. Fits perfect, not see through, adjustable tie straps, I absolutely love it and will order in other colors as it is perfect for a wide range of occasions. I am 5’6”, 140lbs, and 36DD and the small was a perfect fit. It does come wrinkled from shipping/packaging so it will need to be ironed, steamed, or dry cleaned prior to wearing. Great price, fast shipping, lots of compliments as well. Ummm. I just noticed that I didn’t receive the tie for this dress. It has a tie in the photo but I didn’t have one. I still love it but would have lived even more with the tie.

Sizes vary across colors I ordered all three available colors in either a size 10 or a size 12. For reference, I am just over 5’9” and weigh about 148 pounds. I tried all three dresses on by either stepping into them or lowering them over my head with the zipper closed. Pine size 12 was slightly loose and did not have that built-in slim wear fit. Shoulders drooped slightly lower than other colors. Navy size 10 was a comfortable fit. Stomach area had that built-in shape wear feel and kept everything nice and smooth. Black size 12 was way too small. Felt smaller than the size 10 in navy. If I had decided to go with black I would probably have had to size up to a size 14 The navy dress in size 10 was my preferred fit. Comfortable to sit in. Snug but not too tight. On the last picture is a jumpsuit by Adrianna Papell that looks very much like this dress but in a jumpsuit style. Keeping the navy blue for formal event and the black jumpsuit for more casual dinner. Both are size 10 (my usual size is 8 or 10). PS: I had a problem with one of the dresses arriving damaged but Amazon was wonderful to work with and provided a solution that worked for me.

Bang for your buck! I ordered an XL - I’m 5’3 & 210lbs. It’s got a quality look and fits well for us curvy girls. It did come in a bag per usual Amazon style shipping so it had maybe a dye/chemical thing where it looked like it had some drips or spots. A quick trip to the dry cleaner and that came right out and they pressed or steamed it and it didn’t wrinkle up while wearing like other reviews mentioned. The side zip is fine but the top of the zipper doesn’t have a eye hole hook that normally see in side closure dresses - that caused a little bit of pinching in the under arm but an easy fix when I wear it in the future. I liked that the belt didn’t have little loops attached to the dress so you could place the sash where your curves are/where you want. This color wasn’t overly thin and I didn’t feel like I was bursting at the seams. I sat, ate, danced and wasn’t worried about busting my dress. The material however is not stretchy so keep that in mind.

Dress gave me confidence in 1st formal event since COVID. I ordered and tried on 4 dresses from Amazon. After being retired for 8 yrs and then home bound for 2 yrs because of COVID. I was afraid to even think about wear a dress to a wedding. But this dress gave me the confidence go! The color was a rich deep, saffaire blue! Lace was stretchy and comfortable. And the handkerchief hem gave it a classy look; hopefully elongating my 5'2” height next to my 6'8" husband! 😂

SO FLATTERING! I ordered and tried on several other dresses similar to this one for an upcoming wedding and this particular dress was SOOO perfect! I was pleasantly surprised at how well this fit and it looked SO good on! The 3/4 sleeves hit just right and the fabric is very nice and stretches well where it’s needed. I’m a 40 DDD, 5’6, 215 lbs, have back boobs and a belly on top of a fupa! This dress hides ALL. I ordered the 2XL and it’s just right. It skims the floor so any shoes I wear if they have a heel will show but the dress flows nicely when walking. VERY HAPPY with this one and will be ordering more for sure!!

Cute and seems true to size I ordered apricot pink in 3XL. My measurements are 44.5-39.5-53“, 5’8, ~250lb. The straps are adjustable and the zipper appears to be sturdy and well made. Fabric seems thin but once on it looks like real silk and feels pretty good. No stitching issues that I could see. No stretch. I expected the dress to run smaller (the 3XL is 45.7x39.4x51.2” and 52” long. The longest part came down to my ankle-ish but I had not adjusted the straps.) but the waist was probably about 2”/2.5” too big so the dress hung kind of sadly. It’s absolutely a nice dress, maybe more for fall than summer so I will definitely order a smaller size for future wedding guest appearances. Def well made, but also def too big.

Beautiful dress that made my courthouse wedding feel magical I ordered multiple dresses from this seller to try for my courthouse wedding, and in general, I was very happy with how quickly they would arrive and how easy they were to return. This dress ended up being The One! It is stretchy enough that I wasn't too concerned about size, and a small fit me well (5'8", ~140 lbs). I didn't end up touching the zipper for the skirt, but it seems like it would hold in whatever position it is set to. I felt both comfortable and beautiful from the ceremony to after dinner, and am so happy I chose to buy a white dress despite not having a traditional ceremony. I even spilled a teensy bit of wine on it, but hey, it's a $60 wedding dress! If I really wanted to, I could just buy another for the memory and still have saved WAY more than most brides. Ultimately, I'm so pleased with this dress, and would not have changed a thing.

I ordered my normal size. LARGE. I am 5’4” and 148. 37-31-40 I know a lot of people out there think that’s a medium. I like my clothes fitted, but not skin tight and stretching at every seam. Plus my ego doesn’t need me to say I fit in a medium. It wasn’t fitted enough in the waist so it just looked unflattering on me. If you look at their size chart… I am their measurements for a Large and a bodycon dress should fit tight. Also, if you are over 50 and are starting to have an aging neck… the neckline accentuates it. Overall the weight of the material was nice which is why I gave it a 3, but the cut is hard to pull off.

5’0”, 95lb, fits perfectly! I ordered the extra small, I’m 5’ 0” and about 95 lbs and it fits perfectly! I was worried it would be too long but with heels (mine are about 4”) it’s the perfect length! It only drags if I’m not wearing heels. The different styles are really great to work with, I can go from fancy wedding to sexy date night in a flash! It’s also worth noting that if you don’t want as much boob showing you can tuck in the strap fabric so it covers more skin. The material is soft and thin, but not see-through (I got the green). Fair warning, you can see nipples through this (as you can see by my first couple pictures), so if you don’t want any nipple showing I highly suggest getting some pasties, they work perfect and you can’t see a thing (I’m wearing pasties in my last 2 pictures) One more warning, don’t wear suede shoes with this! I got a pair to go with the dress and didn’t realize that this dress material sticks/gets caught on suede. I bought a new pair of pu (not fuzzy) heels and they don’t stick or get caught at all. I included a couple different styles I tried, and the last two pictures are the dress with pasties on

I ordered the Light Coffee in size small. It fit as expected. I am 5 feet, 34B and a size 4. I would describe the color as a yellow golden brown. On my monitor the vendor photos look more of a copper brown. Subtle difference. At around a $20 price point, I am happy with this soft silk like crop sleeve blouse. I think it can pass for a nice dress up shirt if styled appropriately. Hem is rounded so looks fine left untucked, though I will likely do a front tuck. It can also be worn completely unbuttoned over another shirt. As well as knotted in the front. So a very versatile style. Buttons are ok, just plain plastic but the color matches well. And I appreciate it can be wash and dried in a machine.

Not the best quality I ordered this dress for the versatility of it being both semi-formal and somewhat costume like ( I was thinking Morticia Addams). However, the item isn’t worth the price tag. There is a decent amount of stretch once you’re able to wiggle the outfit on. It takes a bit of wiggling because if the length and material that can easily tear. Once on it shapes to the body. I’m only 5ft so the XS was long on me with some bunches. The material is somewhat translucent and itchy, especially around the neckline. The texture is an accordion style crinkles which adds to stretch. This dress would be more flattering on a tall hour glass figure, otherwise it overwhelms someone my size.
I love this dress! I ordered this dress for work and I’m so pleased with the fit and feel! I felt confident and sexy as well as professional. I got the small. I’m 5’6”, 125lbs, 32x26x36.

VERY STUNNING DRESS I ordered this dress from another company, but like it so much I wanted to share with Amazon customers what I found out. I feel that great reviews are a huge help in making better choices.First of all, it is made from a jersey type fabric of medium weight. The detail is so flattering. The front fabric is swept to the left forming tucks down the left front. There is a slit in the left side seam the goes up to about mid-thigh. That slit can be closed down to a lower point, perhaps to the knee area. It's a personal preference.There is beautiful ruching (gathering) along side of the zipper in the back, which is a very flattering detail. There is no lining in the skirt portion of the dress, but the upper bodice part is fully lined. There is no built in bra, and no need for one. You can wear a regular bra under it with no problem.I noticed that the straps were about 1/2 inch too long on me, and once shortened, the dress fit much better. Before adjusting the shoulder straps, they tended to drift outward, exposing my bra straps.On me, the dress was the perfect length. I am 5'6" and weigh about 150. I usually wear a perfect size 10 in a long gown, but ordered this in a 12, which was the correct choice. I had read other reviews stating the need to size up one size if you were between sizes. I have a bit of a tummy, and you can see it in this dress. A body shaper will resolve that issue (or losing just 5 pounds).The most important thing I can say about this dress is that it is extremely dynamic, very stunning. A real show stopper. My husband loves it. I have long blonde hair, which goes very well with the dress in black.I highly recommend that you seriously consider this dress. You won't be disappointed.

Custom sizing was worth it I ordered this dress hoping it would be a good look for my sister's upcoming wedding. I have a short and pear shaped body, and I have trouble fitting in between small and medium sizes depending on the brand. (5'2" and 145lbs - Bust 36, Waist 32, Hips 40) I noticed that the seller offered custom sizing, so I ordered the "one size" option where I could type in my custom measurements for a little fee, and I am so glad I did. The dress is beautiful: the color and texture match my expectations based on the photos, the dress has a soft lining inside to prevent it being sheer anywhere but the flutter sleeves, the construction seems good and it isn't shedding glitter.

Nice dress, but not true to color online! I ordered this dress in 3 different colors. 2 out of the 3 were a perfect match to the picture shown online. The yellow one unfortunately was not! The dress is a bit long for shorter women ( I’m 5’3 ) but other than that it’s a nice breathable material and fits well.

Love in (almost) every color!!! Great buy! I ordered this dress in 4 colors to try for a spring wedding. They are all in a size medium, except for the red floral, which is a large. All 4 had the same style, and the 3 mediums fit the same, as well. I please note that the red floral fabric was one sided, meaning the under side of the fabric was essentially white. This made it feel very cheap. I preferred the floral pattern of the medium green and the navy blue, but the dark green/teal color was really stunning. I ass a petite woman with a large bust, I really appreciated the adjustable straps, stretchy back, and self-tying front. With a little practice, I was able to tie the front to show what I felt was an appropriate amount of cleavage and to feel secure with no bra (a major win!!!). I would also note that the slit went a bit high when sitting down, about mid thigh for me. I ended up going with the medium green dress and loved it! I’m returning the rest but keeping the navy blue in the back of my mind for a future occasion. For reference, I’m 5’2”, 140 lbs, 36DD, and usually between medium and large sizes.

Perfect fit, style, and flattering for formal occasions! I ordered this dress in a Medium for a formal dinner I went to. I am 5’3”, 160LBs ish, 34C, and wearing 3 inch heels in the photo. It was a little snug on me but very flattering and makes all your curves look amazing. I would say true to size and runs shorter than most. This will likely be short on those taller than 5’6” or 5’8” and wearing medium or smaller. If you don’t have curves then it will make it look like you do and you will be complimented all night. Material is not sheer at all although it’s a little thick. Can wear a normal bra and the outline may show but no color or sheerness. Cap sleeves are very flattering if you’re self conscious of your upper arms, as I am. More of a fall/winter dress rather than summer so you’ve been warned. The ruffles were not distracting or cheaply done, I was playing with the one on my legs because of nerves most of the night and being antsy! And this dress DOES ride up if you take longer steps as it is bodycon but there is ruching on the front of the dress that would disguise the look of the dress riding up. Overall a very flattering dress and I am impressed and holding on to it for future occasions!

Fabric was able to stretch and very comfortable. I ordered this dress in a size 12 at 9 months pregnant for a wedding that was scheduled 2 weeks post delivery. The 12 was a guess based on my pregnancy weight. Normal size is a 10. I ended up returning the 12 and getting a 10. I am 5 '0 154 pounds. The dress needed altered at the bottom and in the bust. An 8 would have likely fit better but overall. I was incredibly pleased. The dress was flattering and accommodated my changing body.

Great dress for the price I ordered this dress in a size large. For reference my waist is 39” and i am 5’7”. I ordered this for a wedding and it was better than expected. The back part of the dress is a nice addition since it stretches

Comfortable But See-Through I ordered this dress in a small. I am 5’2 and weigh 120 lbs 34 DDD. The material is stretchy so you can order true to size. The reason I am only giving this dress 3 stars is because the material is thin. I don’t think I can get away with wearing underwear in this dress without them being seen which gives it a cheaper look.

Wrong color but still cute I ordered this dress in baby blue but got it in white. It’s a size small which is odd because I think I ordered an XL. Surprisingly It fit just right, I’m 5”3’ 187 pounds. It is a bit see through so I may need to get boob tape or pasties to feel 100% comfortable.

Pretty Cocktail Dress! I ordered this dress in Black in an XXL. It arrived packaged inside a plastic bag.I am 5'6" tall, 210-215 lbs. and I normally wear a Size 18 in pants. The XXL fit me nicely. It is a bit clingy and a bit snug around my problem area (my belly), but just a little. The fabric is stretchy, so that helps, too. The dress has a long slit in the back, allowing you to walk freely.The sizing chart says that the XXL should fit women in the U.S. who wear a size 20-22, and it MIGHT, but I'm a Size 18 and I would say it might not look good on women in the 22 Plus Size range just because it's even a bit snug on me. According to their size chart, I should have ordered a size XL, but I'm glad I went up one size because this dress looked very form-fitting on the model.This dress is very lightweight and COMFORTABLE and looks pretty good on. The ruffles add that extra something special. I will probably wear a shrug to cover my shoulders when wearing this dress.Overall, I like this dress and give it 5-stars based on the fact this is an online clothing store. This would not be a 5-star dress at say a boutique or a store like Nordstrom's, but you are buying a dress online for under $40 (February 2024), so it's a great value and a great cocktail dress for the money you're spending!

Love it I ordered this dress in black. I am 5’3 and 130 lbs and ordered a small. Fits perfectly.

Flattering Feminine Classic Dress in Burgundy I ordered this dress in burgundy, in my usual size small. At 5'5" and 115 lbs., it fits me perfectly. The flouncy sleeves, tailored seams on the top, and full skirt are flattering. You'll feel pretty wearing this dress! The belt is "just for looks" and sits a little above my waist which is nice for hiding a belly and giving the skirt a nice swing. The color is a nice, rich burgundy. My only complaints: the dress isn't lined and the skirt seems a little clingy without a slip. Also, the care instructions are confusing. The online description claimed "machine washable," but the tags attached to the dress and sewn into the seam say otherwise (see photos).

Love this dress! I ordered this dress in navy blue size large. I normally wear a medium but having read the sizing guide, I opted for large, and it is the perfect fit. I’m 5ft 6” and 145lbs. It’s so comfy to wear, the fabric feels thick/good quality with just enough stretch, and fits closely everywhere you want it to, without feeling tight. The way the ruffles fall, the slit is not too revealing, just enough to show a little leg. I love the ruching on the tummy - very flattering. I bought this dress for a Fall wedding, and I know I will feel comfortable to sit, eat, and dance in it! Highly recommend!

Ready for the holidays! I ordered this dress in red with the approaching holidays in mind and it will be perfect! The material is soft and bouncy. It clings a little in the back but is mostly flowy. I got this in a size XXL. I am 5’7” and normally wear a size 18 in dresses and I would say the XXL is a perfect fit for me in length and size.

BEAUTIFUL! And great price point! I ordered this dress in small (I’m 5’10” and 169lb) and I was worried after looking at reviews it would be too tight. To my surprise, it fit just right! And it’s a beautiful design, sleeves are sheer, shapely/form fitting if you order the right size, and the slit isn’t too high. Love this dress!

Color is off…and came with stains on skirt. I ordered this dress in the “wine” color, but it looks more like a cranberry red not the purplely plum wine represented in the listing images. Also, it’s a little too snug at the waist for me. FYI, the ribbon has no give. I’m 5’6”, 145#, 34D, and normally size small in dresses for reference. I ordered this dress in a small and was able to zip it up…but it’s snug. Also, the skirt portion came with some stains on it. Overall, not impressed. This dress would be fine in a pinch, but there are definitely better dresses at similar price points out there.

Fun sparkle with a 70's vibe I ordered this dress in the green color in size M. I am 5'8 125lbs 34A. It fit very comfortably with soft material and the length hit at knee level. It has a slightly empire waist, so if you are larger chested and want to have the waist hit lower, you probably will want to size up. The material is see through fabric with sequins, and fully opaque lining (almost- a little short on the bottom of the skirt length) with a grosgrain ribbon band at the waist. It also has a nice sturdy back zipper which opened and closed well. There is a v neck, but not too low, and split flutter sleeves, which give the dress a very 70's vibe. The color of the sequins on this dress is really pretty, and it shifts through shades of blue and green very strikingly. Overall, a sparkly, fun cocktail dress that works great for holiday parties.

Elegant and flattering dress I ordered this dress in white polka dot, size small. For reference, I'm 5'4", 125 lbs, and my measurements are 33" 26" 36." I wear a size 4 in most clothes and am a 32D. I do sort of wish the seller had this dress in XS, as I think it might have fit me slightly better. For the most part though, size small fits great. Just beware if your measurements are smaller than mine. Overall impressions: This dress is really pretty and has a classic look. I was pleasantly surprised at how nicely it's cut and how flattering the style is. The smocked waist is tasteful and sits at my natural waist. The v-neck is attractive but not too revealing. The bust area is slightly loose on me, but it lays really nicely. And, because of the string at the back, you can tie it to adjust the bust/neckline area to a degree. That said, you'll likely need someone to help tie the string. I found it really awkward to attempt on my own. It's not a detriment though, as it's a pretty feature. I really like the side slit in the skirt. It's not too high, and the loose flow of the skirt keeps it from being wide open most of the time. It just provides a subtle flash of leg once in a while. The material of this dress is a pretty, sheer, chiffon-like fabric. However, it is lined! So, show through is minimal. I would likely wear a skin-tone bra and slip with the white dress for the best coverage though. There were several loose threads hanging out, but they can easily be trimmed off. The color of the dress is a soft white with gold metallic brushed dots. Simple, but pretty. This is a great dress to wear to a summer wedding, baby/bridal shower, outdoor party, etc. The black version would probably be perfect for evening functions. I highly recommend it!

Defective Fabric I ordered this dress in White, based on all the positive reviews. Loved the fit!!! (XL, 5'6", 200lbs) Beautiful design etc! The problem is that the fabric has a lavender tint to it, especially in the peplum area. Lavender isn't even a color the dress was offered in. It's very faint, yet obviously NOT solid, white. I returned the 1st dress thinking it was just that ONE dress. Second one came today and you can still see lavender...even before I opened the bag. Pictures are with and without filters. I'm soooooo disappointed!!! Returning this one too.

I returned the 1st dress thinking it was just that ONE dress. Second one came today and you can still see lavender...even before I opened the bag. Pictures are with and without filters. I'm soooooo disappointed!!! Returning this one too.

LOVELY DRESS I ordered this dress last minute fir my sisters wedding. I already had a dress but wasn't crazy about it. Wanted something elegant but comfortable. I am 5'4 and 148 lbs. I ordered a size medium. Fit perfectly and I'm a picky person. I would highly recommend this dress. The slight off should bow is just enough to give it that sexy but elegant look. The split is not too high, hits just right. I was very pleased with the dress.

Very comfortable but size down! I ordered this dress last minute for a friends wedding and it arrived within 2 days. The dress is very comfortable and I love how it was fitted around my waist and yet not too tight either due to the nice elasticity it gives. I’m almost 5’3 and I’m 140 pounds so I’m normally a medium. I ordered a small due to the reviews saying it ran on the larger side and it does so size down! I am sold on this product and I’m planning to order more in the future in other colors!

Better than expected!! I ordered this dress last minute for a gala and it was perfect! The inside of the dress is lined and incredibly soft unlike most sequin dresses. I’m 5’3” and the length was perfect with 3” heels. The shape is flattering and no need for a bra but works well with fashion tape if you want some sort of support. The material was so nice. I was super impressed!!

Almost perfect! I ordered this dress last minute for a professional function. In my great wisdom, I didn't even try it on until I was getting ready to leave the house - fortunately, it fit like a glove! I am 5'4 and it fit me PERFECTLY wearing sneakers. If you are any taller (or plan to wear heels) this might end up being too short for you! The only complaint I have about this dress is that you have to wear something under it or your will be nippling all over the place - since I didn't try it on and find that out earlier, I was substantially limited in the ways I could wear the dress to ensure that the wrapping covered my bra. I did end up safety pinning it in place in a few places. If I had done my research (or opened the package before putting it on my body and walking out the door) I could have used tape, petal covers, or even a strapless bra to expand those options. I am so glad this is the dress I ended up getting, and it is SUCH a steal for the price.

Perfect for the occasion I ordered this dress last minute for a wedding and it came in just the nick of time! (2hrs before the wedding!) I'm 5'6" and weight about 160. I got a large and it fit great. Only thing to be mindful of is when sitting the slits show a bit of thigh but as long as you are aware of it you can easily cover with the dress. Was light weight and very comfortable. Recommend if your looking for a formal dress for any occasion.

Dress was stunning! I ordered this dress last minute for our elopement in the forest. It came in a couple days and was a perfect fit aside from length, I hemmed about 2 inches in the front. I wore 4” heels and am 5’4”. Everyone has raved about it, no one had a clue it’s not from an expensive bridal salon.

Surprisingly stunning! I ordered this dress last minute to match a cute shirt I’d purchased for my fiancé, and it was a beautiful match. I got the “mint” green in size small, and it fit beautifully. I am 5’9” inches tall, and my measurements are bust: 33, waist: 26, fullest part of hips: 42. I am contemplating ordering another in size extra small to see if I like it better in the bust, but I actually think this one looks fabulous. Not too loose, not too tight, though I did have to wear a bra to ensure the lift needed to fill it out properly (small bust!). So I’m general it runs true to size, perhaps a smidge large? The material is 100% polyester but not super cheap feeling, which was very nice. Given the nature of “fake silk/satin” it does hold on to moisture strangely, so beware of stains (sweat, water, etc.) but it wasn’t super noticeable after drying, but I could still tell if I looked closely. This dress is a good bang for your buck in my opinion, and I was lucky I didn’t get a lemon. It drapes beautifully, and looks very chic. I wore it with nude pumps as well as sandals, so I think the the right accessories it can be dressed up or down. Very swanky! A+ can recommend!

Fantastic short dress for tall girls I ordered this dress on a whim for my college graduation. I’m 5’10 and short dresses don’t usually look flattering on me, but this dress is sooo pretty! I feel really good in it and it’s not too short to where it looks like it could just be a long shirt. Absolutely recommend this dress, I’ll probably be ordering more colors of this dress!

Last minute purchase to wear to a wedding I ordered this dress on Thursday and received it on Saturday for a wedding I was attending the next day. I was pleasantly surprised by how the lace material felt soft. I’m 5’2, and the dress touched right above the knee. It’s a pretty pink and loved the sheered sleeves. Definitely a dress worthy of a second look.

Last minute purchase to wear to a wedding I ordered this dress on Thursday and received it on Saturday for a wedding I was attending the next day. I was pleasantly surprised by how the lace material felt soft. I’m 5’2, and the dress touched right above the knee. It’s a pretty pink and loved the sheered sleeves. Definitely a dress worthy of a second look.

Perfectly flattering dress! I ordered this dress six days before my daughter’s wedding and I am so glad I did. It was very comfortable and flattering with the high waisted skirt. I got many compliments and others asking where I got the dress from. I’m 5’4’’ and 185. I ordered a Large. Highly recommend!

Highly recommend this dress!! I ordered this dress thinking “it’s cheap enough, if I don’t like it, it goes back”. I. Love. This. Dress!!!! I ordered it for a wedding where I’m meeting my boyfriends family for the first time. The length is perfect, it covers up enough to be classy but fitted and flattering enough to be feminine and sexy. The material is thick - no see through and honestly, bra is optional!!! I added the crystal belt so it’s not so plain (comes with removable belt/bow) but this dress is the perfect addition to your wardrobe for a wedding or holiday party 😊 5’7”, 140lbs, 36D and a medium fits like a glove!!

Oh Yes!!! I ordered this dress three nights before my event and I was very happy to receive it as noted, the day before I needed it. In ordering the dress, I looked at the size guide, took my measurements, and ordered accordingly. When I tried the dress on, it fit perfectly!!! I’m 5’4” and had on 2.5” heels. The dress was not too long and hugged my body perfectly. I didn’t have time to take it to the dry cleaners; therefore, I ironed it myself. At first I tried using a steamer but that didn’t work well. The fabric is on the thick side but not too thick. I did use the steam feature on my iron and that did the trick with getting the wrinkles out. I would definitely order this dress again in another color. Oh yes!

Great dress! I ordered this dress to attend an event and it was perfect. Made super well! I’m 5’2, 118lbs and wear a size 0/2. Im petite and wanted it to fit snug so ordered the XS and it was perfect. I would definitely recommend a small for a less fitted look if you typically wear a size 2/4. Perfect dress for so many occasions!

Great dress! I ordered this dress to attend an event and it was perfect. Made super well! I’m 5’2, 118lbs and wear a size 0/2. Im petite and wanted it to fit snug so ordered the XS and it was perfect. I would definitely recommend a small for a less fitted look if you typically wear a size 2/4. Perfect dress for so many occasions!

Great quality and fit I ordered this dress to be my wedding dress . It did not disappoint . The fit was perfect . I ordered a Medium . I wear medium top and size 8 jeans weighing about 150 and 5’4 . The quality was excellent and the price was very reasonable . I got so many compliments and felt beautiful .

Great for the occasion! I ordered this dress to create a Merryweather fairy godmother costume and the dress was perfect. I appreciated the top stayed closed as I was working with young children. There was no cleavage whatsoever. It was also full enough for me to wear a 6 ring hoop skirt. I'm 5'7, and wear between a 14-16 in dresses. I ordered an XXL and I'm glad I did. An XL would have been a bit tight. The length was to the ground, which was another perk. It is a heavy dress so if I wear it as a normal dress I would wear it during Fall or Winter. I'm pleased with the quality. The dress is exactly what I hoped it would be.

Cute Dress, Has Pockets! I ordered this dress to have something simple for occasions when a little dressing up is necessary. I liked that it was solid color, but had a definite waist, and thought the neckline was unique. I'm 5'5, 135 lbs, and a 36D, and I ordered the large and it fits me well. I might have been able to order the medium, but I'd rather it be a bit roomy than tight and honestly it feels like it fits perfectly. The material is slick and shiny so it's not as comfortable as a cotton would be, but that's to be expected since it's mostly polyester with some elastane. The pockets are a welcome addition and they are actually decently deep and usable! Overall, I really like this dress and think it will look great with a cardigan and some heels. I could see it being used for many different occasions or events where a "dressy casual" balance needs to be struck. I think it is worth the $40 being charged and would recommend it to others!

Stunning dress! I ordered this dress to wear at a wedding and it was so pretty. This dress exceeded my expectations. I am 5’5” and wear a size 18/20, I ordered the size 20. The dress was a little bit long but I wore a 2 inch heal and it helped. The dress still touched the floor but I wasn’t tripping. I did have to hold sides and raise it as I went up and down stairs. I received so many compliments and seriously felt so beautiful.

It’s OK I ordered this dress to wear for a birthday dinner. While, I will admit what I got quite a few compliments, I was not impressed with the dress at all. The fabric is extremely flimsy. The sizes run a bit bigger than what was initially in the size chart. Also, there are shoulder pads inside of the dress excessive, considering there’s no actual support and the upper chest part. I wore pasties undermine just as a precaution. I’m 5’6 and my measurements are 37 inch bust, 31 inch waist, and 44 inch hip. The dress definitely fit differently from what was advertised. I think it may fit closer to the image the seller uses if you have smaller boobs. It is extremely stretchy so no need to order up a size. I wouldn’t say it’s extremely versatile as it may only be appropriate for nighttime wear. I would not wear it to a family function at all. I think it’s a bit pricey for the quality that you get. So overall, I think the dress is OK, but I wouldn’t order another one.

Received a lot of compliments! I ordered this dress to wear for New Year's Eve and received a lot of compliments. It was very comfortable. The fabric isn't sheer at all and has a good amount of stretch. I ordered a medium which worked better for my figure over all, although I would have liked it to be a little smaller on the top. I am 5'4" and weigh approximately 135-140 lbs. My measurements are Bust 36", Waist 29", Hips 39". I usually wear a 32DDD or 34DD bra, size small shirt, size 2 or 4 in pants and dresses depending on the brand. I hope all of information helps others choose their size!

Absolutely beautiful gown I ordered this dress to wear to a black tie affair. I am 5'5" and 175 lbs and wear a size 10 dress and jeans. I ordered one size up, a 12 and it was a perfect fit. I wore 2 1/2 inch heels and the dress just about touched the floor. I did not need to have it shortened. I had so many complements. I felt it was made well and looked very expensive. It has pockets which was fun. I did wear a little lace jacket as I am self conscious of arms. I am extremely happy with this purchase.

Worth it I ordered this dress to wear to a Christmas party. I didn't want the typical red design. I'm 5'5 130lb 34DDD. So I ordered a small. The dress is long and will drag on the floor. I had on 3in stilettos that night and the dress was still touching the floor. The material is thick enough so you won't be cold but also thin enough to not be flattering and show all your rolls, lump, and dimples. The top fits funny, in the front it look tight and nice but in the back it's a lot of extra space, where the bra fasten. The slit is at an appropriate level, you don't ever have to worry about the goodies showing. I was very pleased overall with the dress. It moved very well on the dance floor.

Very Pretty Dress! I ordered this dress to wear to a formal dinner and it was perfect. The color is stunning and it is very comfortable and flattering. It is perfect for hiding that little belly paunch! I was comfortable in it all evening and didn't have to suck it in LOL. I am usually between a med/lg depending on how things are made. Based on other reviews, I went with the large (dark blue) and it fit well. For reference, I am 5'2 and 155.

Very Flattering! I ordered this dress to wear to a wedding and I am obsessed with it 🤩 I am 5’7, 155 pounds with a size 38DD chest. I ordered a size Large in the Teal color. It looked a little large when I opened it however it fits me perfectly. It is a thicker material that does have some stretch to it. I tried it on without my body shaper on and it actually didn’t look bad. The material is very forgiving and does help to hold everything in. It falls right below my knees and is comfortable to move around in. The teal color is beautiful! Definitely a new favorite dress of mine!

Great fabric and great fit I ordered this dress to wear to a wedding in April. It arrived today. I tried it on and I LOVE it! I am 5’5” 195 lbs with a wide apple shaped frame and large-ish chest. I ordered the short sleeve dress in burgundy and it is flattering, in my opinion. The photo is hilarious because it was tried on right out of the package, I am wearing a nude sports bra and 2 different shoes for options.

Stunning dress! I ordered this dress to wear to a wedding in October. The bride had requested a color palette for all her guests to wear and I didn't have a dress in her chosen palette. I found this dress on Amazon and was impressed with the variety of colors it came in which were perfect for this wedding palette. I looked at the reviews and was pleased to see the variety of sizes and shapes of women who looked good in this dress. I knew other dresses I had in tiered layers looked good on me so I bought it. I was not disappointed! For reference, I am 5'10.5" tall, 220 lbs, and wear a size 18. I bought my normal size and it fit perfectly! In the photo I'm wearing Benjamin Walk sandals with a 1.75" kitten heel and this dress still hits just below my knee. Perfect length! Because of the tiered layers that covered my gut, I didn't need to wear any shapewear nor did I need to wear a bra because of the upper lining in this dress. I'm smaller busted so that worked fine for me. I was extremely comfortable wearing this dress all through the wedding and reception. I highly recommend this dress. I got so many compliments on it all night and my husband loved it so much he suggested I buy another one in another color for spring, which I did! I bought another one in the mint green.

Perfect dress for a bridal shower or rehearsal dinner I ordered this dress to wear to my bridal luncheon. I was a little skeptical when I ordered this dress…considering the very inexpensive price I just didn’t think it would look like it was of good quality or be flattering. I was very pleased with this dress! I ordered the color apricot in size large, I am 5’6 and 173 pounds. I personally thought the dress was flattering. It is great for summer because it is very light weight but still good quality for the price! It also has a lot of give to it. I did wear shape wear with this dress…but I tend to wear shape wear for most any special occasion. I was very pleased with this purchase!

Don’t pay attention to reviews! I ordered this dress two sizes larger based on reviews as I am a larger busted woman. It was way too big. I had to return and order a size down. I loved the look of the dress and this will look great for a wedding. I am 5’4” and weigh 171 lbs.

Game changer LBD I ordered this dress very last minute for a formal wedding after deciding I wouldn’t feel comfortable in the dress I had originally planned to wear. It arrived the morning of and was perfect right out of the box. I felt confident and sexy all night and received many compliments on the dress. As somehow who has need been feeling great about their body lately, this dress is an absolute game changer. The only con is towards the end of the night the zipper would not stay up as other reviews mentioned. A safety pin solved the problem but I will be sewing a hook in as I plan to wear this dress for many other occasions. It’s my new go to LBD. I am 5’4” with long legs. 34C. Currently between 145-150lbs with an athletic build, thick thighs and booty. The medium fit like a glove with plenty of stretch while still holding everything in place.

Surprised in quality and fit I ordered this dress with low expectations but I got a very nice dress. I was expecting the exaggerated sleeves to droop down and be either too long or too short. I was surprised in the fit. Sleeves were nice and full. The quality of the fabric isn’t great but it’s comfortable and stretchy. I ordered according to the size chart. I’m 5’4 and a half and about 160 with a D cup. I wore pasties and tape to make sure no accidental mishaps and wore 3” heels. The length was perfect for me. It did fit a little big but I pinned it for the photo shoot and will take it to get taken in. Overall I am satisfied with the dress and the quality matched the price. I believe it’s a polyester blend so you’ll be sweaty if worn out in the heat.

BUY THIS DRESS!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! I ordered this dress yesterday (11/24/19) and arrived the next day in the evening. PERFECT!!!! I read all the reviews trying to find some information. A lot of reviews really help me to decide but I was still skeptical. I decided to risk, so If was not a fit, I just return and go to a store. The dress fits perfect and it’s so comfortable! Now, here’s some information that I hope it’s for you to decide. I’m 5’4”, bust 42, waist 37, hips 48, 197lbs, yeah, I’m short and out of shape. I followed some reviews, the size chart and ordered the XL, Black. I felt like I had a little more room but I feel comfortable since a have “that little belly”, this dress hide a little bit. I know it’s a long review and I don’t usually write reviews but this dress deserves all the compliments because it’s gorgeous, fits perfect and I think is a good quality for the price. Usually women don’t like to wear the same dress more than once, so why do you need to pay a lot for a dress that probably is gonna be in your closet most part of time? I hope the pictures help, the light didn’t help too much.

Beautiful Dress! I ordered this elegant dress in the Champagne color and I love it! The fabric is silky soft and has a nice weight to it. There is no stretch to the fabric. The stitching is a nice quality and there is a discreet zipper on the side which makes putting it on easier. The back does go down pretty far, so a bra would show. I plan on having this dress altered to close the back; there is enough fabric there to do it. The dress goes down to my ankles and would look great with heels; no hemming is required. The ruched waist is very flattering since I have a bit of a tummy.I am 5'1"/approx. 100 lbs/32D bra size and the XS fit me well. I am very happy with this dress.

Beautiful and Comfortable at a Great Price! I ordered this evening dress specifically to wear for formal night on a cruise. The fit was perfect for me. I'm 5' 4" and weigh about 170 pounds, and the size 16 was perfect. It is very forgiving in the stomach area which is where I hold most of my weight. I received many compliments on the dress, and felt comfortable in it all evening. It does have padding, so you can wear this without a bra, however; I wore a strapless bra just for a bit more support. I didn't have this dress hemmed, however; I was wearing higher heeled shoes. The dress was still a bit long, so something to think about if you're on the shorter side. You will want to have it hemmed or wear very high heels. I felt beautiful wearing this dress. The piece that drapes down the back is fun, romantic, and flirty. Even though I'm a fuller figured girl, I felt confident of how well I looked in this dress. And, it was well made considering the price tag of $65.00. I have no complaints at all, and recommend this dress.

Fits weird- needs alterations I ordered this for a 1920’s wedding. This is such an awkward dress. The front is way too low and the back and a huge amount of extra material that bulks up once tied with the straps. I had the waist taken in and added a couple extra loops on the back to evenly distribute material. Once that was done the dress was great! Perfect length, even though most Amazon dresses are made as if you are 6’7 basketball player. You will definitely need to use tape to keep the girls from falling out. By the end of the night sequins around the waist we’re coming off. Even though it’s a beautiful dress I would not go through all that hassle!

Gorgeous dress! I ordered this for a 1950s photo shoot I was doing and this dress was awesome. It fit great, material was soft! I wouldn’t call it an everyday dress, definitely something to achieve the 50s look! I’m about 5’6, 180 lbs and the XL fit great.

Perfect for second trimester I ordered this for a January wedding after seeing a few reviews saying it is bump friendly. It was flattering, and I felt very comfortable in it all night. For reference, I'm 5' 7", 160ish and 20 weeks pregnant in the photo. I ordered a large, and it was perfect.

Great quality. Order a size down! I ordered this for a maid of honor dress in the burnt orange. the color was accurate, maybe more towards a terracotta color. The dress is very stretchy I would recommend sizing down. I needed a size smaller than offered so I will be getting it altered. The dress is actually really comfortable due to it being stretchy. The under layer of the dress is shorter than the tulle overlay but still touched the ground on me in 4 inch heels (I’m 5’0). Overall, would recommend!

Absolutely perfect I ordered this for a Mardi Gras ball date night with hubby. It fit great. I’m short so it was a bit long (5’3) but I liked that because I got to wear some really cute jeweled flat Sandals. I was super cute and comfortable. Bonus that hubby loves my shoulders out.

Absolutely perfect I ordered this for a Mardi Gras ball date night with hubby. It fit great. I’m short so it was a bit long (5’3) but I liked that because I got to wear some really cute jeweled flat Sandals. I was super cute and comfortable. Bonus that hubby loves my shoulders out.

It’s so comfortable! I ordered this for a maternity shoot I have coming up, and I’m so pleased with the purchase. It is a tad bit more red than wine or burgundy like I had expected, but it’s still to my liking and I’m excited to wear it. It flows nicely, the sleeves are the perfect length, and the chest fit me perfectly. I am a 38 DD, it is a little bit loose but if you’re worried just stick a safety pin in it at the bottom. I’m 5’7, and normally 170lbs without my baby belly but right now I’m at 190 with the baby belly and I ordered a large, it’s really ideal. It’s so comfortable, and soft.

Gorgeous and comfortable, but sizing could be tricky I ordered this for a mid-November wedding in New Orleans. My husband is walking his sister down the aisle, so even though she’s skipping the usual wedding party business, I figured a properly nice dress would make sense. I’m 150-155lb, 5’10” tall, have a disproportionately long waist and normal length legs. I typically wear a size 12 in pants and size L in tops/dresses. I don’t do fitted bras anymore since my boobs are different cup sizes, but they’re relatively small for my size. At a guess, my left boob is a B cup and my right boob is an A cup. I ordered a size Large in this dress. It fits beautifully, but I had to pull it over my shoulders and squeeze into it. I do not think it would have fit if I had notably larger breasts. There is no way I could have stepped into it with my size 12 hips. I would have busted a seam. Getting it off was a bit tricky too. There is a single long zipper in the middle of the back for putting it on or off. I was able to zip it up without help. I got my husband’s help unzipping. The lace cover on the front will not perfectly hide bra straps. If you look closely at my pictures, you may note that I had a brown bra strap showing underneath. It’s not obvious, but I may opt for something more discreet during the wedding. The dress is solid over the breasts, and the skirt has a solid underlayer with a sheer dark green layer over it. It is soft and comfortable. It’s possibly the most comfortable nice dress I’ve ever worn. I’m not 100% sure it will still be comfortable if I start sweating in it, but I had no issue lounging in it in my home for the ~2hrs between when I put it on and when my husband finally surfaced from his office to see it. My biggest concern was my cats might rip into it with their affection. It is gorgeous, and I love that it’s conservative at the same time. I’m not AGAINST dresses that show more, but when I’m the nearly 40yo sister-in-law of the bride, and I’ll be managing two school-age kids with autism during the wedding, I don’t want to be wearing anything that could result in wardrobe malfunctions or unwanted attention. I want something lovely but respectable, and this achieves that. I strongly recommend this dress for a comfortable and beautiful wedding party option. Please note that you may need to go up a size to accommodate your breasts for pulling this dress on if you’re not relatively flat-chested like me and still have decent hips.

Pretty Dress I ordered this in a large and it fit perfectly. I'm only 5'2 so if you are tall it may fit a little shorter. I thought the length was perfect for me. Fits well, nice "drapey" fabric I ordered this in a size large and it fits well, I am 5'3" and 145 pounds. This has a nice slit up the side and will look amazing with heels! The fabric is very nice, it has a "drapey" appearance to it which makes it very flattering.

I'm in love with this dress (but it's not a cocktail dress, IMO). I ordered this in blue, and I ADORE the bright, vibrant color. I equally adore the easy care, non-wrinkle fabric, the gathering at the waist, and the unique hem line. I knew from the fabric content in the listing that this would be more like an office dress for me than a cocktail or similar type of use. So, I don' t love that about the description but I DO love the dress! Size charts sometimes confuse me and this one seemed REALLY small. I'm never sure if they are listing the measurements of the dress itself (that will stretch) or body measurements (unless they specify, and this one does not). The measurements for bust don't correspond with the US size to the left on the chart, which made it a little tough for me to decide between Small (my US size) or something else. If I had used my bust measurement alone, I'd have ended up with Large or XL but I split the difference and took a chance on medium. That turned out to work perfectly. The dress does have stretch, but I wouldn't have been comfortable in a small and I think a larger size wouldn't have had the same snap in the shape. For reference I am 5'3", 126, 36.5-29-37

Super Cute Dress, Great Fit and Value I ordered this in Blue, XL and it is perfect! It fits great and is pretty flattering. I am 5' 4" and it hits right at my knees. The floral detailing in the bodice is really cute and the color is a vibrant royal. It is lightweight and comfortable and the skirt fabric is swingy. The only negative I can see is that it is hard to find a bra that will work with the neckline - you will likely need a strapless bra. I am really happy with this dress and at the current listed price of $32 it is really a great value!

CHECK THE SIZING INFO! I ordered a size up for a perfect fit. I ordered this in the "caramel" color, size medium. I usually wear a small, but decided to size up based on the sizing info provided. I'm glad I did because the medium fits PERFECTLY. For reference, I am 5'2" and about 125 lbs. Bust is 32" and waist is 28". The fabric is really soft and stretchy, the fit is comfortable and flattering... so much to love about this dress. Only downside I can think of is that it seems pretty prone to wrinkling. But other than that, I'm very happy with it.

Comfortable, Flattering, and Easy to Care For! I ordered this in the color "Black" in the 2XL (or XXL). I am 5’6” tall, weigh approximately 210-215 pounds, with a bit of a belly. I normally wear Size 18 pants and a 42D bra. Because the dress looked so form fitting, I went with the 2XL, instead of following their "Size Chart" and I am glad I did! I feel like I could dance all night in this dress without being constricted in any way!But . . there are two things that may have come with getting a slightly larger size (or maybe because I'm only 5'6" tall: (1) the dress is L-O-N-G; and (2) the leg "slit" comes up way too high! But this is nothing that cannot be fixed by wearing high heels and using a safety pin (or getting this professionally altered a bit). For taller women, this dress might work great because it IS super long!I tried to take some close-up photographs of the shimmery pin-striping this fabric features. It is barely visible in their photographs, but it is a "PLUS" in my opinion. TIP: When shopping for black clothing online, try to look at the same item in a lighter color to see details which often get lost in photographs on black clothing.This dress is super easy to care for, too! Simply machine wash on cold and tumble dry on low heat. It is so stretchy and comfortable to wear!The dress does have a zipper in the back, although I was simply able to easily pull this on over my head without using the zipper. This is a nice, comfortable, flowing gown and, at just $47.98 (July 2024), I might just have to purchase the same dress in the "Lake Blue" color, as well!

Great For Apple Shape or Plus Size Girls This Runs Small-Glad I Sized Up! I ordered this last minute for a wedding and THANK GOODNESS for Prime! Got it in 2 days just in time. BE PREPARED: The hem was very wrinkled when it came but I used a portable steamer on it for about 5 minutes and it was perfect! I read the reviews and the sizing suggestions saying to order up because it runs small, I wasn’t sure if I should go up 1 or 2 sizes since gaining weight, the girls are bigger than ever. I went with a size 20 because that’s all they had at the time in a darker color and it worked! I felt comfortable and received a ton of compliments. I’m over 50, 5’9 220 lbs and 42DD, usually I wear an XL or XXL top & 14/16 pants. I recently had foot and knee surgery so I knew I couldn’t wear cute shoes but I was happy with the overall outcome. I highly recommend trying this dress, Especially if you are plus size and/or apple shaped. It’s very hard to find a dress that is flattering & this will work for many different body shapes..

I’m over 50, 5’9 220 lbs and 42DD, usually I wear an XL or XXL top & 14/16 pants. I recently had foot and knee surgery so I knew I couldn’t wear cute shoes but I was happy with the overall outcome. I highly recommend trying this dress, Especially if you are plus size and/or apple shaped. It’s very hard to find a dress that is flattering & this will work for many different body shapes..

Elegant and comfortable! I ordered this last minute for a work gala. I don’t usually buy dresses in bright colors, but I didn’t want to be one of the many wearing black. Amazon suggested a size large based on other purchases I’ve made, and I decided I would rather it be a little too big than too snug. For reference, I am 5’5”, 150 pounds, 36DD. As you can see, this dress is perfect! I think I could’ve gotten away with a medium, but if you are chesty, you may want to go a size up like I did. This dress is a steel at $50, and I know I will definitely wear it again. Highly recommend!

sexy bodycon dress with some issues I ordered this OWIN women's wrap dress for a night out and it definitely brings the wow factor. The dress is very form-fitting and hugs all the curves. The ruched design helps camouflage any problem areas in the tummy. The material is soft and stretchy with a bit of sheen. It's not too thick so it's breathable for dancing. The wrap V-neck is quite low cut but stays in place. The asymmetric ruffle hem adds a flirty touch. I'm 5'6" and 140lbs, the medium fits me well but is very snug. If you are between sizes or prefer a looser fit, I recommend sizing up. The length hits me mid thigh which is shorter than I expected. Pros: sexy and curve-hugging fit ruching helps hide tummy soft and stretchy fabric low cut V-neck is alluring cute ruffle detail on skirt good for parties and nights out Cons: runs small, may need to size up wrinkles easily and needs steaming This dress is perfect for making a statement on a night out if you don't mind showing some skin. Just be prepared for the tight and short fit. Pair with heels and accessories for a head-turning look.

Lovely dress, comfortable, great length I ordered this pretty dress in the Navy Blue in an XXL for my daughter who typically fits into a 14/16. She is 5'7" and it hit just above the floor; with her low heels it was perfect for walking and not catching her foot on the dress. The lace is sheer but not so much that you could notice easily, and fit over her broad shoulders well. The sweetheart neck gave her complete coverage, the skirt had a large pleated sheer overlay, and the zipper was smooth. We added a pettiskirt to give the skirt a little more oomph (not too much) and it worked perfectly! She was ecstatic with the dress and ended up adding her own detailing to the skirt. She said the dress was very comfortable and wore it for hours with no issue.

Soft, hangs well, vibrant red color I ordered this red maxi dress, with deep side pockets, in a medium (US 8-10). I am 5'6" and the length of the dress was just right, will work with high heels or flats. When I first tried on the dress, the sleeves were a bit snug on my upper arms. But, with the amount of stretch in the fabric, the upper sleeve quickly loosened up. The dress fabric is 95% Rayon and 5% Spandex. This combo allows the dress to be soft, comfortable, hang well, have a nice amount of stretch making it easy to pull on over your head. The dress has a flattering V neck with a high waist, which makes it forgiving in the midsection. The dress is machine wash, hang to dry and light iron. The weave of this unlined dress makes it a bit too thin for my taste. However, depending on the outside temperature, this can be an all seasons dress, which can be dressed up or down. I gave this pretty red dress 4 stars based on the attributes previously mentioned. Overall, this is a nice maxi dress.

Flattering on a short & curvy frame! I ordered this to wear to my nephew’s wedding and was very pleasantly surprised how flattering it was on my very short (4’ 11”), curvy (130lb) and busty (36DDD) frame. Very comfortable and flattering! I ordered this, along with several others, looking for a dress to wear to a summer evening wedding. I always choose black because it’s slimming and it doesn’t show perspiration. The other dresses got returned because this one was the most flattering on my figure. I’m usually a size 14 but with a large chest, so sometimes I have to go up a size to accommodate. I ordered 16W in this and it fits perfectly! The waist is at an appropriate place, even with a large chest, not pulled up to empire level, so it doesn’t look like a maternity dress or emphasize the tummy. It’s stretchy and fairly lightweight. The sleeves look a little bit matronly but it’s not a dealbreaker. I’m 46 and I think it looks appropriate. For reference, I’m 5’8” 185lbs, chest 36-38H. Ordered a size 16W.

Beautiful dress for busty women I originally bought 2 sizes up per the measuring chart, but had to return and buy only 1 size up because top part of dress was too large. Received it really quickly & had no issues sending back. Loved the style of dress, felt flattering, liked the long length (completely covered boots with slight heel/almost too long, I'm 5'6") but was not a fan of how low cut it was in front. Being plus size, I don't have the plus size bust to fill it out properly. Got alot of much needed help from a push up strapless bra with clear straps. By looking at the picture you would never know I'm just in between a B-C cup, though. The wide neck line also had me pulling up over my shoulders at times as they would slightly fall, and had me covering my cleavage as much as possible. It wasn't something you could pin to fix cleavage either, so you have to wear a deep V bra, and mine could be seen from certain side view angles at times. Other than the top running big, the rest if the dress was very comfortable and I received compliments as well. I would say the Ever Pretty brand dress is a great value and quality for the money.

Beautiful dress but odd sizing for off the shoulder I originally bought a medium as that’s my normal size (29 waist, 34 bust) but I was SWIMMING in it. BUY IT I originally bought the spaghetti strap version of this dress when it first came out and I followed the sizing chart to a T and got a Medium. I have never worn a more comfortable dress, each paycheck I’m getting it in a different color. Good shapewear is hard to find, good shapewear in clothing form, even harder! Buy this dress, you won’t regret it!

Love it, BUT… I originally had a different style dress in mind (TShirt style) but this was the closest to it I could find. Fits perfect and doesnt scratch inside since it has a liner inside. Honnnnneyyyy!! Get it! I originally ordered a medium and it fit fine, but was a little short. This is a large and I have space. I'm 5'7 approximately 175lbs

Amazing dress- if you are hourglass shape - size down I originally ordered a size 10... but it was WAY too big!! I’m 5’7 155lbs. I ordered a size 6 for the dress I have now and it fits amazing!!! I wish they would do measurements by your rib cage instead of waist bc w the dress having an empire waist. The sizing is too large if you measure by your waist. I can’t WAIT to wear this dress to my Christmas party!!

I feel gorgeous I originally ordered a size XL Plus, and it was okay, but a little loose in the waist. I ordered a L Plus (size down) and I love it and it feels really flattering. It's accentuating the bust and waist more. I'm 5'5", about 168 pounds, and my bust (without a bra on) measures at 41 inches, my waist is 35 inches, and my hips are 40 inches. If you have similar measurements to me, I'd recommend the L Plus and not the XL Plus. My measurements are taken without shapewear on, but I do have shapewear on in the pics. My only complaint is that, if I didn't have tan shapewear on, you'd definitely be able to see my underwear if I bent over. Get nude underwear or something to wear underneath this dress.

Perfect formal dress I originally ordered this dress in an XL and XXL. I decided to keep the XXL for the fit and length. I’m 5’6 and the XXL was a perfect fit for my height. However, had to get bust altered because it was way too big. I loved the dress and it was perfect for the formal event I attended.

So Comfy and Elegant I originally ordered this in size large. I ended up sending it back and getting a medium. I’m 5’3” and 152 lbs. The fabric is stretchy but doesn’t look like it is. I felt beautiful in this dress and got a ton of compliments.

Super cute & comfortable I originally purchase the pink dress but didn’t end up keeping it because I didn’t need it for the event I was going to. Very elegant but LONG I originally purchased an 8 based on my measurements. It was pretty loose, and I replaced it with a size 6, which fit perfectly--I'm 140lbs/5'4". It was VERY long on me--I cut 6 inches off the bottom. I had a lot of trouble hemming it--it's so cheap that I would recommend just having a pro do the alterations. I actually ended up removing the hem job I did and just left the bottom unfinished. It did fray a bit, but it worked for a one-time wear. The red is a nice deep color. Overall, great dress for the price!

Dress is Beautiful, but Came Ripped. Overpriced for the Quality I originally purchased this dress in red and I liked it but the fabric is almost soft t-shirt material, definitely overpriced for the fabric itself. The dress is flattering, hides my belly and cellulite (im 5’4, 137 pounds. Usually buy Medium or Large. I purchased a medium). The fabric is light but not see through. I LOVE the fit. The elastic around the band on the sleeveless side seems to stay up. BUT giving three stars because I definitely got a dress someone else tried on (or wore). It was covered in pet hair and the armpit was ripped… I can deal with the hair (lint roll it). But the rip.., To the point where I probably shouldn’t wear it out because I’ll rip it more. Super disappointed because I do love the dress. UPDATE: I ordered a replacement dress and it came. It’s not ripped but still has deodorant stains on it. Probably from someone trying it on and returning it, so I’ll live with it.

Versatile and flattering! I picked green but the color was more of a teal. I dug it though because it just happened to match my septum ring. I’m 5 months pregnant and needed to find a dress for a wedding. I tried several others and looked like a whale or so unshapely in all of them. I ordered this on a hail-Mary. Lucky I did! The fit is really one size fits all and was so flattering. I was happy to be able to choose how the bust/neckline looked and how tight or loose I could make it. I’m 5’5” and it was way too long. But all I needed to do was hike it up at the waist and tuck it in and under the bottom of the chest area before tying the top straps down around my waist. It held like a dream for the entire ceremony/reception. One thing to note, the fabric is really sheer so make sure you’ve got a good bra unless you want the ladies to say hello. Also, keep in mind that due to the sheer fabric, anything wet will show up on it really well until it dries. No just wiping it off. So, tears, spilled drinks, etc, will show really well. Also note, if you’re someone who may experience any kind of wetness (you know… down there) due to regular discharge, bladder leakage, mensuration, etc, be sure to wear a panty liner, because the dress is unforgiving. Lol. Just saying.

Be prepared to google directions I pitched this dress because of all the great reviews a fb saw many ppl used this dress for maternity photos. The dress was not my favorite and here’s why: it is stretch but very thin. Know you will most likely have to spend more money on pasties to hide your nipples or shapeware. I purchased 2 black dresses, and 1 purple. Black in size 22 and 20 for my daughter and myself. We are both 5'5". She's 234lbs, I'm 209. Size 22 came with a legit In'Voland label and tag, the size 20 didn't and just says 20W. Measurements for both dresses from shoulder to shoulder, sleeve length, dress length and width, are identical and fit identically. So the sizing is either inconsistent or maybe I received something mislabeled or by a different manufacturer. I docked 1 star for the size inconsistency. The Purple, which I had purchased in size 18, the purple colour is not as advertised in the listing, not the royal purple conveyed. The actual purple I received was maroon purplish wine red, with more red undertones than blue. While purple is difficult to convey in photography, there shouldn't be such a drastic difference. Some may like this reddish kind of purple, but I didn't, so returned it. The dress did have the actual In'Voland label and tag as well. I would say the sizing was correct. I docked 1 star for the colour misrepresentation.

Beautiful fit, upsized. I purchased a L (my actual size) and an XL at the same time bc I did not have time to return / reorder before my event. I knew one would fit. It turned out the XL was the one that worked out. Likes - Gorgeous green color - Lovely crochet style - Asymmetrical hem 😍 - Shipped and arrived very quickly Dislikes - Just a bit too small, sizing inaccurate in my opinion. I simply used the larger size as the number/ size in the outfit doesn’t matter to me, just the perfect fit. - Crochet catches on everything. (Possibly a feature, not a bug. I sew so I fixed mine, but others may not be so able) - Billed as ankle length, but I’m 5’8 and that is really a stretch. Still pretty though, and absolutely Would buy another color if needed.

Overall a Winner I purchased a Large. I'm 191 lbs and 5'7. The fit was perfect. Not to tight and length worked wonderfully. I can say I didn't love the bulky seams but they were easily overlooked. If you are uncomfortable with you're belly and don't like how body con dresses form to it. Get good shape wear. This dress isn't to tight but it can hang occasionally on some unflattering places. It's is a nice material that IS NOT SEE THROUGH 🙏 So overall for me it was a win!

My favorite dress! I purchased a medium in red and black in October, and just purchased a medium in black. I typically wear a medium in dresses, and these fit true to size. The black one I just received is longer than the red and black by about 4 inches. I have worn, washed, and dried the red and black several times since October, so that may be the reason; I am going to wash and dry the black today and will update this review if it shrinks. The black is also a little looser in the chest- I have to adjust it more to keep from showing my bra, and will probably pin it with a safety pin when I wear it out (if washing doesn’t help). They arrive quite wrinkled from being stuffed into bags during shipping, but the wrinkles release with washing and drying, and I have never had to iron the red and black before wearing, even after folding it in a suitcase for a day. These are great for petite women, even the longer black one doesn’t drag the ground, and I am 4 foot 11. For reference, my other measurements are 39-31-43, and I weigh about 140 lbs currently. These are great summer dresses- very lightweight material. In lighter colors, I would worry about being able to see underwear through them, but in the dark colors you cannot. The slit is the perfect height to show some leg without a wardrobe malfunction, and I love the sleeves- they are loose enough that they don’t make me hot. UPDATE AFTER WASHING The black dress definitely shrank a little from the washing/drying- blue circle photos are after washing, and it is now just a hair shorter than the red and black one. It also shrank up just a bit in the sleeve length and in the chest- sleeves are now the same length, and the chest doesn’t move as much and expose my bra. If it fits you out of the bag, be sure not to dry it. If it’s just a bit too big or long, pop it in the dryer on medium after washing.

Pleasantly surprised! Great cocktail attire dress I purchased this dress as a last minute outfit for a “garden formal”/cocktail attire wedding. I couldn’t believe the quality, and it is definitely appropriate for cocktail attire. The dress is stretchy and didn’t constantly fall down throughout the night, and it was very comfortable for sitting and dancing. I personally wore shapewear under the dress, but only because I was bloated from travel. The outer layer is able to be slightly ruched to hide any tummy insecurities! It also comes with shoulder straps if needed to make sure the dress stays put on the top. I bought a large and it was perfect! Amazon recommended XL, and I’m so glad I went off of reviews and photos because the dress would have been much too big had I used Amazon’s recommendation. My measurements: Height 5’9” Widest hip: 44” Waist: 32.5” Bust/band size: 34” Usually size 10-14 depending on brand

Not as long as I'd hoped. I purchased this dress for a graduation ceremony for my husband. It's a gorgeous dress, and the measurements are 100% true to size. I ordered a 3X which was big on me, and I only ordered the 3X because I wanted to make sure that the dress wasn't hugging me too tightly. I am 5'8" and 230lbs, and I carry my weight in my stomach (thanks to pregnancies). This dress concealed what I wanted it to and still looked beautiful. It wasn't as long as I'd hoped it would be. I had about 3 inches from the ground. Ideally I like having about 1/2 inch off the ground. The reason I'm only giving 4 stars instead of 5 is because of the stitching on the end of the skirt. There were places that lots of thread was coming off. When wearing the dress it wasn't very noticeable, however I found it disappointing. The top is very soft and stretchy while being flattering. I have a very hard time with my body image and when I wore this I didn't feel as though the parts of my I'm most insecure about were exposed. The sequins are a beautiful touch, but can be easily manipulated. I would absolutely purchase this again.

Perfect for Packing I purchased this dress for a last minute cruise my husband and I went on. It arrived in a small package. I was excited to see how it unfolded and to my amazement there wasn't a wrinkle in sight! It was the perfect dress for packing. The fabric is light weight however it was plenty thick to feel covered. I am 5'4, 110 pounds. The small was a little long, even with 3.5 in heels and the chest area was big; however, I'm just an A cup so that's generally an issue with dresses. Overall I loved the way it looked and for the price I don't think I could have found anything better. I received several compliments through the night from strangers and each time my husband just laughed because he knew I only paid $35. for it.

Had to see what it looked like in person and FELL IN LOVE! I purchased this dress in another color and print I liked better on screen, but this one intrigued me, so I bought it, too. It turned out that this dress was the MUCH better option! The print is clear and vibrant, and it is a perfect fall themed dress, with the darker colors. The fit is true to size and is very flattering. It comes with a wrap around tie that you don't necessarily need to use. I'm not big on jewelry, so I did use it to fancy up the dress a little. I'm a bit busty and hippy, but I have a small, high-set waist. I'm 5'6.5" and am wearing a large. The material is like a heavier nylon or polyester, making it extremely easy to clean. The tag says handwash, but I washed it in the machine (cold water) inside a large mesh bag and hung it to dry and it is fine. It has a tiny bit of weight to it, but once it's on, you won't notice, and it won't make you hot, either. I got a lot of compliments, and am very happy I took a chance on this design. (The green floral one was very disappointing. It looked like a watercolor painting gone wrong. The colors and images were not as crisp and clear as the blue floral, and this made it look cheap, unfortunately.)
